ops.body: 2026-07-19 rescope (approved plan figure-out-whats-next, N6): title narrowed to the E14 stage-3 futility pilot — the only unshipped scope. Shipped elsewhere: weekly lane + auto-promote (v0.12.0), judged gating (C3, cc_steer/retrain/judged.py lineage), 4B/8B/9B base sweep (C4; final result 9B 0.9371 > 8B 0.9301, 35B refuted). The bundled criterion's first three drills (forced no-op rejection, synthetic-better promote, rollback) belong to the shipped v0.12 promote machinery and remain unexercised — they stay in the criterion alongside the E14 futility rule.
